page.t: Salvage Wrecked Ships
Salvage wrecked ships in designated sectors.
Sectors
Sectors to look for wrecks.
Salvage Target
The target station for salvaged wares to be sent
Notify on salvage?
Send a notification to me when a wreck is salvaged?
Dock when idle?
Dock at the nearest safe station when nothing to do?
Salvage Wrecked Stations
Salvage wrecked stations in designated sectors.
Wrecked Ship Salvaged
Wrecked ship %1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) in %3(sector name) was salvaged and the wares were sent to %4(target name) \(%5\)(target ID code).
%1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) salvaged %3(salvaged wreck name) \(%4\)(salvaged wreck ID code).
The following wares were salvaged:\n%1(ware list)\n
A total of \033G%s(total value)\033XCr was salvaged.\n
\033B%s(ware name)\033X x\033C%s(ware amount)\033X\n
\033B%s(ware name)\033X x\033C%s(ware amount)\033X out of \033C%s(total ware amount)\033X \(\033G%s(added credits)\033XCr added\)\n
Wrecked Station Salvaged
Wrecked station %1(station name) \(%2\)(station ID code) in %3(sector name) was salvaged and the wares were sent to %4(target name) \(%5\)(target ID code).
